prompt: Estimate or interpret the measurable condition and state why it is out of tolerance.
scenario: You are on a commercial construction project governed by building codes, submittals, and third-party inspections. The work under review is PEX & copper installation, part of the Piping & Plumbing scope. The observed field condition is: copper unreamed (visible burr). The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: IPC, mfr specs. The measurable cue is visible enough to estimate whether the condition is within tolerance.
title: Measurement check: PEX & copper installation (commercial project)
